data.title: [ccc3-954a] RED: Write verification test for zero runtime plugins/dso refs in agent/skill markdown
data.description:
## What to do
Create tests/hooks/test-no-plugin-markdown-refs.sh — RED bash test asserting zero unexempted plugins/dso runtime refs in agent/skill markdown files.

## Test behavior
Must FAIL before migration is run.

```bash
#!/usr/bin/env bash
# Test: zero unexempted plugins/dso runtime refs in agent/skill markdown files
MATCHES=$(grep -rn "plugins/dso" plugins/dso/agents/ plugins/dso/skills/ \
  --include="*.md" \
  | grep -v "shim-exempt" \
  | grep -v "plugin-self-ref-ok")
if [ -n "$MATCHES" ]; then
  echo "FAIL: Found unexempted plugins/dso references in markdown:"
  echo "$MATCHES" | head -30
  echo "(showing first 30 of $(echo "$MATCHES" | wc -l) matches)"
  exit 1
fi
echo "PASS: Zero unexempted plugins/dso refs in agent/skill markdown"
```

## Also add to .test-index
```
plugins/dso/agents/*.md:tests/hooks/test-no-plugin-markdown-refs.sh
plugins/dso/skills/**/*.md:tests/hooks/test-no-plugin-markdown-refs.sh
```

## Files to create
- tests/hooks/test-no-plugin-markdown-refs.sh (chmod +x required)
- Update .test-index with mappings above

## testing_mode: RED
